description: Smoke 2: synthetic approval gate posted to operator campfire; mallcop fetches finding context, prompts operator, operator approves with text, mallcop calls approve-action with operator's exact words; gate fulfills.

prerequisites.operator_deployment: mallcop agent must be deployed with operator campfire configured and mallcop-sk-* key provisioned
prerequisites.note: LLM smoke cannot be run without operator deployment. See smoke_prerequisites below.

smoke_prerequisites: Forge running and reachable at FORGE_BASE_URL
mallcop agent deployed with a valid operator campfire
the approval gate must be posted to the operator campfire (synthetic — posted by hand for smoke test)
mallcop-sk-* API key with operator scope
approve-action tool registered in agent capabilities

synthetic_gate_message.justification: Impossible travel detected: login from Tokyo 8 minutes after login from New York. Credential likely compromised. Recommend disabling account pending investigation.

seeded_finding.detail: Login from Tokyo (35.6762N, 139.6503E) 8 minutes after login from New York (40.7128N, 74.0060W). Physical travel impossible.

expected_step_sequence.description: agent reads gate payload from approval-request campfire message
expected_step_sequence.verifiable: gate_id, finding_id, action_name, justification all extracted

expected_step_sequence.description: agent composes structured approval prompt to operator with finding context, action, justification, and approve/deny/question choices
agent waits for operator response on campfire from non-mallcop sender

expected_step_sequence.operator_response: approve - confirmed legitimate deploy, this was our contractor in Tokyo

expected_step_sequence.description: agent calls approve-action with operator's exact words as operator_reason

expected_call.operator_reason: approve - confirmed legitimate deploy, this was our contractor in Tokyo

replay_instructions: Seed seeded_finding in Forge. Post synthetic_gate_message to operator campfire. Watch agent trace for steps 1-6 in order. At step 5, post operator_response as a human message. Verify approve-action is called with the operator's exact words.
